expo.name: Eushop
expo.description: Get something from somewhere, person to person. Trips, neighbours, and open asks on one map — profiles, chat, public handoffs.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your approximate location (5 km cell only) for city- and route-based discovery — your precise address is never sent to anyone.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take photos for your profile, trip listings, and items you offer or request.
